items.title: What Claude can do
items.description: This topic defines what Claude is; the sibling topic lists capability areas (language, code, vision, tools) with concrete examples.

items.title: Common use cases
items.description: Use cases show how teams deploy Claude after understanding the basic assistant vs model distinction.

items.title: LLM foundations
items.description: Claude's core mechanism is a large language model; this sibling explains tokens, context, and prediction at a beginner level.

items.title: Anthropic mission
items.description: Anthropic's safety mission explains why Claude is developed as a steerable assistant rather than a raw autocomplete engine.

items.title: Key strengths
items.description: Strengths and limitations refine the high-level picture—what Claude is good at and where human oversight still matters.
